professionalReview: Do not use this local fixture to change medication, supplements, diet, screening, reproductive decisions, prevention plans, or treatment decisions.
Bring personal and family history, symptoms, prior testing, lab reports, ancestry context, and any confirmed variants to a qualified genetics professional if discussing this topic.
Treat sibling Healthcare Pro sample rows as report-format examples only, not as local geneticist findings.
